title: In Australia, Victoria and Tasmania Waive Transit Fares as Fuel Prices Soar
summary_full: The measures in Victoria and Tasmania are temporary, but show how far and how intensely the oil shock from the war in Iran has spread.
summary_public: The measures in Victoria and Tasmania are temporary, but show how far and how intensely the oil shock from the war in Iran has spread.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: oil shock from the war in Iran has spread
